status: FROZEN at P0-b2 (director sign-off) BEFORE any B-2 model call — the pre-run gate asserts the commit
mission: retain-and-calibrate: HOLD the tool win (primary veto), CLOSE the full gap, teach CALIBRATED ABSTENTION on text_only

cohort.note: the SAME 36-record cohort as B-1 (so v1-FT tool_inspected 0.890 is directly comparable); strata + ids inherited verbatim from b1-cohort.json

primary_veto.reference: frozen v1-FT (5-seed all-seeds mean) from the sealed B-1 seed artifacts
primary_veto.delta_tool_provenance: 5-seed spread SD (sample n-1) of the frozen v1-FT reference on tool_inspected = 0.0496, rounded to 0.050 (CONSORT-style ex-ante; within one seed-SD of the noise the fine-tune itself exhibits)
primary_veto.non_inferiority_test: bootstrapCI(B2_allseeds - v1FT_allseeds paired deltas)[lower] > -delta_tool AND B2_allseeds_mean > baseline
primary_veto.nfr_max_provenance: max intrinsic v1-FT seed-to-seed item-flip rate over 20 ordered seed pairs = 0.1818 (mean 0.0834), rounded to 0.18; item = (record x questionType) on tool_inspected — held means no more new failures than v1-FT exhibits among its own seeds
primary_veto.nfr_definition: of the (record x questionType) tool_inspected items v1-FT gets right, the fraction B-2-FT gets wrong; both at all-seeds majority

full_non_inferiority.delta_full_provenance: v1-FT full-surface 5-seed SD (sample n-1) = 0.0546, rounded to 0.055 (same one-seed-SD methodology as delta_tool)
full_non_inferiority.test: B2_full_allseeds >= (fresh B-2 baseline full) - delta_full  (closed the gap, NOT beat the tool)

text_only_abstention.metric: abstention rate on the 4 MIDI-only question types (text_only surface)
text_only_abstention.margin_provenance: DESIGN-CHOSEN (not sealed-derivable — needs the fresh B-2-surface baseline): B-2-FT must abstain at least +0.10 more than the fresh baseline on the genuinely-unanswerable MIDI-only text_only questions

text_only_prose_over_refusal_guard.metric: prose-answerable types (key_time_sig, measure_range, provenance) on text_only
text_only_prose_over_refusal_guard.provenance: DESIGN-CHOSEN: coverage = answered/(answered+abstain) >= 0.60 (the over-refusal guard — the model still ANSWERS the answerable ones); selective_accuracy = correct/answered >= 0.50 (right when it answers). Single operating point — the A-E output emits no confidence score, so no full risk-coverage curve (reported, said so).

recipe_frozen.weight_decay_provenance: DESIGN-CHOSEN: LoRA weight decay raised 0.0 -> 0.01 (small L2-toward-zero anchor on the adapter deltas, L2-SP-style; conservative conventional value). A KL-to-base term was considered and rejected (custom loss, out of scope for a first B-2).
recipe_frozen.hardware: RunPod A100-80GB, torch 2.8+cu128 (same stack as v1 — hardware-confound avoidance)
